title: Hespir Everwyern

title: Ascension Conclave
caption: The Fellowship, gathering in full for the first time since the crisis during the Purge of Dalaran, convenes to welcome new fellows en mass, marking a new turn of fortune for the ever dwindling membership which was nearly wiped out completely during the Fall of Quel'Thalas.
